summary: Good‑quality recording (upgrade from cassette) of a solid show highlighted by Bird Song, Blow Away and a strong Fogerty set, though the bass sounds thin.
review: The reviewer finds this matrix‑type upgrade impressive overall, noting clear sound but commenting that the low end is a bit thin. Musically the concert shines with Bird Song, Blow Away and an energetic Fogerty‑focused segment, even if guest saxophonist Clarence Clemons doesn’t add much.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; the show receives praise while the recording is noted as an improvement over cassette but with thin bass, leading to a blended rating around 4 / 5.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Upgrade from cassette; overall clear and listenable but bass tones are somewhat thin.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows well, highlighted by the Fogerty songs and guest appearance; despite Clarence Clemons’ limited contribution, the concert is described as a great show to be at.

band_member_comments.Phil: Bass tones are somewhat thin according to the reviewer.
